name: avoid_low_accuracy_tickers
warning: Do not issue strong buy signals on tickers with swing_accuracy below 56% such as 010950.KS at 53.5% or 003550.KS at 56.1%
reason: Tickers below 56% accuracy generate more losing trades than winning ones, eroding portfolio performance over time
regime_context: All regimes, especially 위험선호 where over-optimism inflates signal count
